checks.description: Verify that the output 'out' remains one‑hot and rotates by exactly one position each clock cycle within the observation window.
checks.pass_condition: All sampled values of 'out' contain exactly one high bit and successive samples differ by a single‑bit left rotation (wrapping from MSB to LSB).
checks.trigger_condition: When reset is released and the clock‑driven observation begins.

checks.description: Guardrail: do not require a fixed number of cycles for the rotation; any number of cycles up to the bounded window is acceptable.
checks.pass_condition: The property is satisfied as long as the one‑hot rotation condition holds; no exact‑cycle latency is asserted.
checks.trigger_condition: During the same observation window used for the functional rotation check.

checks.description: Ensure that after reset release the output stabilizes before any rotation is observed.
checks.pass_condition: No change in 'out' occurs within the first two clock cycles after reset deassertion; subsequent changes follow the one‑hot rotation rule.
